params.name: Requiem
params.description:
On May 22, 1792 AD, Mozart's Requiem was finally completed by his assistant Sussmayr.
Mozart's dying wish was finally fulfilled. Previously, a mysterious man had asked him to create a music piece. Mozart had an ominous feeling. He felt that the man was Grim Reaper who came from the underworld and Requiem would be his last creation. The ill-stricken Mozart felt that he would be dying soon and did not want to leave the world with his work unfinished. Unfortunately, this piece had to be complete …
